display.purpose: Home page hero, the site title in large format. The handwritten identity of FamilyTribute.

headline.purpose: Person names on detail pages, story titles, major section headings within a page.

title.purpose: Sub-section labels, card headers, modal titles. First appearance of Open Sans in the hierarchy.

body.purpose: All prose: obituary text, story content, descriptions. Must breathe at 65–75ch max width.

label.purpose: Dates, metadata, navigation links, button text. Never uppercase-tracked.

shadows.name: card-ambient
shadows.purpose: Default elevation for content cards. Warm amber ambient glow.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Lifted hover state on interactive cards (people grid, pictures, stories).

shadows.name: surface-overlay
shadows.purpose: Nav bar and subtle surface separation without strong contrast.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Modals and dialogs. Inkwell-tinted for heavier presence.

shadows.name: button-hover
shadows.purpose: Lifted glow under primary buttons on hover.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (color, shadow, opacity).

motion.name: ease-out-card
motion.purpose: Card hover lift — fast in, gentle out.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Card hover, shadow transitions, nav underlines.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action. Amber background, sentence case, no uppercase tracking.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #bf8028; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: normal; text-transform: none; padding: 14px 36px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #8b5c18; box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(140, 80, 30, 0.30); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #bf8028; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with amber border and text.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: transparent; color: #bf8028; font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: normal; text-transform: none; padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1.5px solid #bf8028; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #bf8028; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #bf8028; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Destructive actions only (delete, remove). Never use for navigation.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #b91c1c; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms; gap: 6px; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background-color: #991b1b; } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #b91c1c; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Person Card
components.description: People grid item. Photo on top, warm gradient footer with name and dates.
components.html:
John Bailey

March 4, 1942 — November 12, 2021
components.css: .ds-person-card { display: block; border-radius: 12px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(140, 80, 30, 0.10); overflow: hidden; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: box-shadow 250ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0.0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-person-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(140, 80, 30, 0.18); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-person-card__photo { width: 100%; height: 192px; object-fit: cover; display: block; } .ds-person-card__footer { background: linear-gradient(to bottom-left, #fef3c7, #fce7f3); padding: 10px 14px; } .ds-person-card__name { font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #1c1410; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin: 0; } .ds-person-card__dates { font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #584038; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; margin: 2px 0 0; }

components.name: Nav Bar
components.description: Primary navigation. White surface, Gwendolyn site title in Hearthlight amber.
components.html:
Family Tribute
PeoplePicturesStories
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 24px; height: 64px; background: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid #ece8e4; } .ds-nav__brand { font-family: 'Gwendolyn', cursive; font-size: 2rem; font-weight: 700; color: #bf8028; text-decoration: none; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-nav__links { display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav__link { font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1c1410; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms; padding-bottom: 2px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; } .ds-nav__link:hover { color: #bf8028; } .ds-nav__link--active { color: #bf8028; border-bottom-color: #bf8028; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form text input with warm amber focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1c1410; } .ds-input { font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #1c1410; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d4c2b4; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8c7468; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #bf8028; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(191, 128, 40, 0.15); } .ds-input:disabled { background: #f4f2f0; color: #8c7468; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Page Hero Title
components.description: Home page hero heading using Gwendolyn at display scale.
components.css: .ds-hero-title { font-family: 'Gwendolyn', cursive; font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem); font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #1c1410; margin: 0; text-wrap: balance; }

narrative.overview:
FamilyTribute is a family tribute archive — a place to celebrate lives, share photographs, and pass stories from one generation to the next. The visual system should feel like being handed a well-loved photo album by someone who loved the people in it: warm, intimate, and alive with personality. Not a product. Not a service. A gift.

The palette is built around hearthlight amber — the color of warm lamplight, old gold frames, and the hour just before sunset. Gwendolyn, a flowing handwritten script, carries the display hierarchy with personal warmth. Open Sans provides clear, readable body prose. Together they evoke the handmade and the human without feeling crafted or kitschy.
keyCharacteristics: Warm amber primary on white surfaces — warmth lives in the accent, not the background
Script display type (Gwendolyn) paired with humanist sans body (Open Sans)
Amber-tinted shadows instead of generic gray or indigo
Photography and content are always the hero — UI elements recede and frame
Celebratory in tone: every design choice should feel like a story worth telling

rules.name: The Hearthlight Rule
rules.body: Amber is used in ≤20% of any given screen's surface area. Buttons, active states, links — not backgrounds. Its warmth is effective precisely because it's not everywhere.

rules.name: The No-Cold-Gray Rule
rules.body: The indigo/violet palette the codebase was built on has been retired. No indigo-*, violet-*, or sky-* Tailwind classes on UI surfaces. If something cool-gray slips in, it's a regression.

rules.name: The Warm Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows must always use amber or warm-brown tinting. A cool shadow on a warm surface breaks the album aesthetic immediately.

rules.name: The Warm Float Rule
rules.body: Every elevated surface uses amber-tinted shadows. If the shadow reads as gray, it's wrong. The rule catches it immediately: does the page feel like it's lit with warm lamplight, or fluorescent office light? Choose lamplight.

rules.name: The No-Uppercase-Tracking Rule
rules.body: The current codebase uses uppercase tracking-widest on primary buttons. That pattern is retired. It reads as a tech product, not a family tribute. Button labels use sentence case or title case, Open Sans 600, no letter-spacing beyond normal.

rules.name: The Gwendolyn-Only-at-Scale Rule
rules.body: Gwendolyn is a script font — it is illegible below 24px and inappropriate in body context. Never use font-header on text smaller than 1.5rem.

dos: Do use Gwendolyn at display scale (≥1.5rem) for names, titles, and section heads. It is the identity.
Do let photography do the emotional work. Design frames content; it doesn't compete.
Do tint every shadow with amber warmth. rgba(140, 80, 30, 0.10) is the shadow base.
Do use sentence case on button labels. The copy should feel like a person wrote it.
Do ensure body text passes 4.5:1 contrast. The audience includes older family members.
Do use white (#ffffff) surfaces. Warmth comes from the amber accent and amber-tinted shadows, not from a tinted background.
Do keep interactive card hover states tactile: a slight lift (translateY(-2px)) plus shadow deepening signals interactivity without shouting.
donts: Don't use the indigo or violet palette. The current codebase is being replaced with the Hearthlight amber system. Any remaining indigo is a regression, not a feature.
Don't make it feel like a clinical obituary site (Legacy.com). No transactional layouts, no form-over-feeling.
Don't design for grief. Dark backgrounds, heavy silence, desaturated imagery treatments — FamilyTribute celebrates lives. It doesn't mourn.
Don't use generic SaaS patterns: no uppercase tracked buttons, no eyebrow labels on every section, no identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly, no gradient text.
Don't use Gwendolyn below 1.5rem. It's illegible as a small font and destroys the identity when misused.
Don't use nested cards. A card inside a card is always wrong.
Don't use cool-gray shadows. rgba(0,0,0,0.1) shadow on an amber-warm surface breaks the album feel immediately.
Don't add eyebrow labels (small all-caps above every section heading). One deliberate kicker is voice; one per section is AI grammar.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left: 4px solid) as card or callout accents.
